title: Comparative epigenomics by machine learning approach for neuroblastoma.
author: Sugino RP Ohira M Mansai SP Kamijo T
content:
S-EPMC9793522 PMC9793522 Comparative epigenomics by machine learning approach for neuroblastoma.

Background

Neuroblastoma (NB) is the second most common pediatric solid tumor. Because the number of genetic mutations found in tumors are small, even in some patients with unfavorable NB
